title: useRef Hook – Accessing DOM Nodes
description: Use refs to directly interact with DOM elements.

slides.title: The useRef Hook 🔗
Basic Example
slides.content: Here's a component that logs the input's DOM node:

quizData.question: What does `inputRef.current` contain after the component mounts?
quizData.explanation: After mount, `current` points to the DOM node itself.
